name: @clearline/domain-expenses
description: Pure, framework-agnostic expense-submission rules — the validateExpense gate (amount, category, receipt-required-over-threshold), the advisory category per-transaction limit check, and submit-time approval-tier routing (L1 vs L2 by amount). No data-access or UI dependencies, mirrors libs/domain/payments.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-006 (US-CW-011 Expense Submission & Policy Enforcement, US-CW-012 Expense Approval Workflow).
